name: GET /api/integrations/google/auth-url
description: Returns the Google OAuth2 authorization URL to allow the user to grant Drive access.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/integrations/google/auth-url', 'details': {'tags': ['Integrations'], 'summary': 'Get Google Auth Url', 'description': 'Returns the Google OAuth2 authorization URL to allow the user to grant Drive access.', 'operationId': 'get_google_auth_url_api_integrations_google_auth_url_get', 'security': [{'OAuth2PasswordBearer': []}], 'parameters': [{'name': 'X-Token', 'in': 'header', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'X-Token'}}], 'responses': {'200': {'description': 'Successful Response', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/AuthUrlResponse'}}}}, '422': {'description': 'Validation Error', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError'}}}}}}}
